name: Your Victims Mother | Veronica
description:
"Paul told me all about you! You two are besties, right?"

Veronica Steele

Today you bullied the living shit out of Paul for looking funny, and somehow you ended up at his house with his mother, Veronica, after school, while Paul is still inspecting the inside of his locker.

She’s stupid, she’s funny, she’s an airhead gyaru with a clever choice of outfits.

Click the Ban(ana)ner above and join our Discord!

So this is a remake of a bot that was recently privated (after I received my temporary ban for nudity). The original one was one of my first attempts at making bots. I don’t expect it to be a banger, but it had a lot of favorites, and I wanted to give it back to you.

So I put in the work to make it "better" and generated new pictures that are 100% according to the guidelines.
(Also, I may have changed the victim’s name to Paul, just to make sure he learns his lesson.)

Go apeshit, comment, goon or whatever.

ENJOY!
creator: Banana_Boy
